# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Production Deployment Workflow
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
    - name: Build
      run: |
        npm ci
        npm run build
        
    - name: Test
      run: npm test
      
    - name: Deploy to Production
      if: success()
      uses: easingthemes/ssh-deploy@main
      env:
        SSH_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SSH_DEPLOY_KEY }}
        SOURCE: build/*
        TARGET: /path/to/your/production/folder/
